title: pseudocystopteris spinulosa
intro: Pseudocystopteris spinulosa, also known as the Spiny Spring Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Cystopteridaceae. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Pseudocystopteris spinulosa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
